summary: Phase 3 testing completed: Production & Rendements, Matières/Fournisseurs, and BQ & Rentabilité modules fully functional. Backend APIs 100% pass (55/55 tests). Frontend pages render correctly with role-based permissions working as expected. Mobile responsive design verified.
passed_tests: Backend: All 5 demo users login successfully (ali, boubker, ayoub, comptable, chef)
Backend: GET /production returns productions list
Backend: GET /production/summary returns correct structure (by_unit, by_engin with rendement, by_work_type, by_voie)
Backend: GET /production/voies lists voies
Backend: POST /production/voies creates voie
Backend: POST /production auto-computes quantity for M3 (length*width*depth)
Backend: POST /production auto-computes quantity for M2 (length*width)
Backend: POST /production computes rendement (quantity/hours)
Backend: POST /production as POINTEUR creates SOUMIS status
Backend: POST /production/{id}/status as RESPONSABLE_CHANTIER validates production to VALIDE
Backend: GET /matieres/fournisseurs lists fournisseurs
Backend: POST /matieres/fournisseurs as COMPTABLE creates fournisseur
Backend: POST /matieres/achats auto-computes total_ht (qty*pu + transport)
Backend: POST /matieres/achats auto-computes total_tva (total_ht * tva_rate / 100)
Backend: POST /matieres/achats auto-computes total_ttc (total_ht + total_tva)
Backend: POST /matieres/achats sets initial payment_status to NON_PAYE
Backend: POST /matieres/paiements creates partial payment and updates achat to PARTIEL
Backend: POST /matieres/paiements updates montant_paye and montant_restant correctly
Backend: POST /matieres/paiements completes payment and updates achat to PAYE
Backend: POST /matieres/paiements auto-creates transaction in caisse
Backend: GET /matieres/situations returns aggregated situation per fournisseur
Backend: GET /matieres/situation/{id} returns detailed fournisseur situation with achats + paiements
Backend: GET /bq/articles lists articles
Backend: POST /bq/articles auto-computes montant_marche_ht (qty * pu)
Backend: POST /bq/articles auto-computes pr_total (sum of all PR components)
Backend: POST /bq/articles auto-computes marge_prevue (montant_marche_ht - pr_total)
Backend: PATCH /bq/articles/{id} recomputes avancement (quantity_realisee / quantity_marche * 100)
Backend: PATCH /bq/articles/{id} recomputes montant_realise (quantity_realisee * pu)
Backend: PATCH /bq/articles/{id} recomputes marge_reelle (montant_realise - cout_reel)
Backend: PATCH /bq/articles/{id} recomputes taux_marge_reel (marge_reelle / montant_realise * 100)
Backend: GET /bq/summary as SUPER_ADMIN returns marge_reelle field
Backend: GET /bq/summary as DIRECTEUR returns marge_reelle field
Backend: GET /bq/summary as COMPTABLE does NOT return marge_reelle field (permission check)
Frontend: Login successful for ali@omotal.ma (SUPER_ADMIN)
Frontend: Login successful for comptable@omotal.ma (COMPTABLE)
Frontend: Login successful for ayoub@omotal.ma (POINTEUR)
Frontend: Production page loads with data-testid='production-page'
Frontend: Production page displays 4 KPIs (Total m³, Total m², Saisies validées, Engins actifs)
Frontend: Production page displays 4 tabs (Saisies, Par engin, Par type, Par voie)
Frontend: Production 'Nouvelle saisie' button opens dialog
Frontend: Production dialog displays dimension fields (length, width, depth)
Frontend: Production dialog shows auto-computed quantity display
Frontend: Matières page loads with data-testid='matieres-page'
Frontend: Matières page displays 4 KPIs (Total achats TTC, Payé, Restant, Échéances dépassées)
Frontend: Matières page displays 4 tabs (Achats, Situations, Fournisseurs, Échéances)
Frontend: Matières 'Fournisseur' button opens fournisseur dialog
Frontend: Matières 'Nouvel achat' button opens achat dialog
Frontend: Achat dialog displays auto-computed totals (Total HT, TVA, Total TTC)
Frontend: BQ page loads with data-testid='bq-page'
Frontend: BQ page displays KPIs (Articles BQ, Montant marché HT, Réalisé HT, Marge réelle)
Frontend: BQ page shows 'Marge réelle' KPI for SUPER_ADMIN (Ali) with value
Frontend: BQ page shows 'Accès restreint' KPI for COMPTABLE instead of marge value
Frontend: BQ 'Nouvel article' button opens article dialog
Frontend: BQ article dialog shows 'Prix de revient' section for SUPER_ADMIN (canSeeMarge)
Frontend: Sidebar navigation displays all Phase 3 items (Production, Matières & Fournisseurs, BQ & Rentabilité)
Frontend: Mobile viewport (420x800) displays correctly
Frontend: Mobile bottom navigation visible with 5 items (Accueil, Production, Gasoil, Engins, Historique)
Frontend: Mobile view shows 'Production terrain' action button on Accueil
